summary: Iteration 61: Complete testing of new CAM Report Aziendale Multi-Commessa feature (Bilancio di Sostenibilità Ambientale). All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend page at /report-cam fully functional with all required UI elements. CO2 calculation verified using World Steel Association factors (EAF=0.67, BOF=2.33 tCO2/t).

backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/report-aziendale?anno=2026: PASS - Returns aggregated CAM data with co2 object, commesse array, fornitori array, metodi_produttivi
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/report-aziendale without da: PASS - Returns totale_lotti=0 and empty arrays with CO2 factors preserved
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/report-aziendale/pdf?anno=2: PASS - Returns valid PDF file (19KB, Content-Type application/pdf)
backend_api_tests.POST /api/cam/lotti + aggregation: PASS - Created test lotti, verified aggregation in report
backend_api_tests.Year filtering: PASS - anno parameter correctly filters lotti by created_at date

frontend_ui_tests.page_title: PASS - 'Bilancio di Sostenibilità Ambientale' with DM 23 giugno 2022 n. 256 reference
frontend_ui_tests.kpi_cards: PASS - data-testid='cam-kpi-grid' shows Acciaio Totale, Acciaio Riciclato, Commesse Conformi, CO2 Risparmiata
frontend_ui_tests.co2_hero_card: PASS - data-testid='co2-hero' shows kg of CO2 saved with green gradient, World Steel source
frontend_ui_tests.commesse_table: PASS - data-testid='cam-commesse-table' renders with correct columns
frontend_ui_tests.fornitori_table: PASS - data-testid='cam-fornitori-table' renders with correct columns
frontend_ui_tests.metodi_produttivi_section: PASS - Displays breakdown by production method (EAF non-legato, EAF legato)
frontend_ui_tests.sidebar_link: PASS - 'Report CAM / CO2' visible under Certificazioni group, data-testid='nav-report-cam'

critical_code_review_comments: CAM Report Aziendale feature is complete and follows requirements
Backend routes /api/cam/report-aziendale and /api/cam/report-aziendale/pdf properly implemented in /app/backend/routes/cam.py (lines 433-582)
CO2 calculation correctly implements World Steel Association factors in /app/backend/models/cam.py (calcola_co2_risparmiata function lines 203-232)
PDF generation uses WeasyPrint with professional formatting in /app/backend/services/pdf_cam_report.py
Frontend ReportCAMPage.js has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Sidebar navigation includes 'Report CAM / CO2' link under Certificazioni group
test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test session test_session_cam_report_1772308633640
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test CAM lotti (TEST_Acciaio S275JR 1000kg 80%, TEST_Acciaio S355J2 500kg 65%) - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: CAM Report Aziendale feature fully functional. New endpoints: GET /api/cam/report-aziendale?anno={year} (returns aggregated report with co2 object), GET /api/cam/report-aziendale/pdf?anno={year} (generates PDF). Frontend page at /report-cam. Key data-testids: report-cam-page, select-anno, btn-download-report-pdf, cam-kpi-grid, co2-hero, cam-commesse-table, cam-fornitori-table. Sidebar link nav-report-cam under Certificazioni group.
